items.title: ‘STAGED’: Conspiracy Theories Are Everywhere Following White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
items.summary: The word “staged” exploded on social media following the attack, as both right and left-wing influencers and anonymous accounts spread unfounded conspiracy theories.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
